title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Pressures Countries to Open Vital Shipping Route
summary_full: As fighting in the Middle East entered its third week, President Trump warned that failing to help secure the Strait of Hormuz would be “very bad for the future of NATO.”
summary_public: As fighting in the Middle East entered its third week, President Trump warned that failing to help secure the Strait of Hormuz would be “very bad for the future of NATO.”
